headline: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Valuation Check As Supergirl Collaboration Expands Pop Culture Engagement
summary: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) has launched an exclusive collaboration with DC Studios’ upcoming Supergirl film, rolling out Supergirl themed product collections, immersive store experiences, and a digital buying guide that could influence how investors think about the stock’s summer positioning. See our latest analysis for Ulta Beauty. At a share price of $520.15, Ulta Beauty has rebounded in the very short term, with a 1-day share price return of 2.52% and 7-day return of 3.19%.
